mechanism_narrative: A rising CPIAUCSL reading with FEDFUNDS still pinned near zero signals an inflation surprise that pushes the market to price earlier Fed tightening, lifting the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL rises for 2 consecutive monthly prints while FEDFUNDS stays below 0.25%
regime_hint: early inflation scare with policy rate at the effective lower bound
failure_condition: If CPIAUCSL accelerates but the 10-year yield falls on the subsequent 20-day window in most triggered cases, or if no positive yield response appears when FEDFUNDS remains near zero, reject the mechanism.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in UNRATE indicates labor-market deterioration, weakening growth expectations and increasing duration demand, which should pull the 10-year Treasury yield lower over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE threshold events are followed by higher 10-year yields in a majority of cases, or if the average 20-day change in yield is not negative after the trigger.

mechanism_narrative: A strong monthly expansion in RSAFS together with stable PAYEMS signals resilient nominal demand, raising expected real activity and inflation pressure and pushing the 10-year Treasury yield upward over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS growth exceeds its 6-month average while PAYEMS is flat or rising
failure_condition: Reject if strong RSAFS months with non-weak PAYEMS do not coincide with positive 20-day yield changes, or if the effect disappears once PAYEMS is included.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in INDPRO signals industrial slack and weaker capacity utilization, reducing inflation pressure and Treasury term-premium expectations, which should lower the 10-year yield over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls month-over-month for 2 consecutive prints
failure_condition: Reject if repeated two-month INDPRO declines are followed by flat or rising 10-year yields, or if the yield response is not negative on average after the trigger.

mechanism_narrative: A housing rebound in HOUST combined with stronger PAYEMS indicates broadening domestic demand, which increases growth and inflation expectations and raises the 10-year Treasury yield over the following month.
candidate_trigger: HOUST rises by at least 5% year-over-year while PAYEMS is above its 3-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if housing-led demand recoveries do not produce higher yields over the subsequent 20 trading days, or if the sign reverses when PAYEMS is above trend.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in FEDFUNDS from near-zero levels signals imminent policy tightening, which lifts expected short rates and pushes the 10-year Treasury yield higher within the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS increases by at least 25 bps within one monthly observation
failure_condition: Reject if rate-hike months are not followed by positive short-horizon yield changes, or if the average 5-day yield response is zero or negative after policy increases.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS is falling and UNRATE is rising at the same time, the labor market is clearly weakening, which should dominate other data and drive the 10-year Treasury yield lower over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS declines month-over-month while UNRATE rises month-over-month
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous payroll declines and unemployment rises are not associated with negative 20-day yield changes, or if either series alone explains the signal better than the joint condition.

mechanism_narrative: In a late-cycle slowdown, weak GDPC1 growth combined with falling RSAFS points to demand exhaustion and lower inflation pressure, which should pull the 10-year Treasury yield down over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if periods of low GDP growth and weak retail sales do not produce lower 10-year yields over the subsequent 20 trading days, or if the joint effect is not stronger than either proxy alone.
